question: Where are the men in the image positioned relative to each other? Select from the following options: (A) All standing in a row. (B) Two standing apart and one standing alone. (C) Two standing together and one standing apart. (D) All standing separate from one another.
answer_choices: Two standing apart and one standing alone
Two standing together and one standing apart
All standing separate from one another
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
